language.heading: Language
language.description: Choose the display language for the application.

mobileNavigation.heading: Mobile navigation
mobileNavigation.description: Adjust how the mobile drawer behaves and animates.

animateBackdrop.label: Animate backdrop
animateBackdrop.description: Fade the dimmed overlay in and out when the menu opens.

animatePanel.label: Animate panel
animatePanel.description: Slide the drawer panel in and out instead of showing it instantly.

closeOnLink.label: Close on link tap
closeOnLink.description: Automatically close the drawer after opening a navigation link.

closeOnEscape.label: Close on Escape
closeOnEscape.description: Allow the Escape key to dismiss the drawer.
